mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders(user_id, order_no, total_amount, pay_amount, status, address_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{orderNo}, #{totalAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{status}, #{addressId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalOrders, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingOrders, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN (1, 2, 3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS paidOrders, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS canceledOrders, COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) AS totalOrderAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN (1, 2, 3) THEN pay_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS paidOrderAmount FROM orders

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, order_no AS orderNo, total_amount AS totalAmount, pay_amount AS payAmount, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM orders ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
